metadata.note: Fixture-scoped proposed balance change for Balance Cockpit Re-Run Diff v1 (#1608). A PROPOSAL ONLY: nerf the degenerate staple smite from 18 to 6 damage. The cockpit re-runs the identical seed distribution with this change applied to a copy of the deck spec and diffs the win-rate impact; it never auto-applies the nerf or writes the trusted spec.
